---
title: Override Test
author: "Document Author"
toc: false
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ["Document Author"]
        - ["Directory Author"]
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - []
        - ["nav#TOC"]
---

## Introduction

This document tests that document frontmatter overrides directory metadata.

## Section Two

More content.
